title: chrysanthemum pulchrum
intro: Chrysanthemum pulchrum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum pulchrum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Chrysanthemum pulchrum is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried herb to be used in herbal remedies.
